message:
fix: update web activity color tests to match 5/10min thresholds (gt-xa5sf)

Tests were using old 2/5min thresholds (3min=yellow, 8min=red) but commit
52588f2f changed them to 5/10min. Update test durations to 6min for yellow
and 11min for red so they fall correctly within the new threshold ranges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
